global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on financial clarity and a strong call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service that offers clarity and rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'SwiftStack' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A large block of text in a clear font, conveying the message about financial clarity.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: A smaller text element that provides further details, likely about the service offered.

elements.label: Secondary body text
elements.description: Another text block that emphasizes the benefits of the service, presented in a readable format.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: A concise text element that adds context to the main message, likely highlighting features.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button or text element urging users to take action, designed to stand out.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A visually distinct button that invites users to claim a reward, likely in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold and eye-catching headline that captures the essence of the ad's message.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: An abstract shape or design element that adds visual interest to the background of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, financial clarity, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: SwiftStack, Your money, clearer, Claim reward
